top_signals.title: Gold Advances as Traders Weigh Fragile Israel-Lebanon Truce
top_signals.summary: Gold advanced after Israel and Lebanon agreed to a conditional ceasefire, a possible step toward resolving the wider Middle East conflict that’s upended global energy markets and raised inflation risks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Why tokenization is an ETF-style market structure revolution
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Portland General Electric CEO Says Rates on Data Centers to Rise by 30%
top_signals.summary: Portland General Electric CEO Maria Pope says an agreement to hike rates on data centers "will have a huge positive impact for all of our customers." Pope spoke with Bloomberg's Tyler Kendall on the sidelines of the Edison Electric Institute 2026 Conference in Las Vegas. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: How to Find High-Performing Stocks
top_signals.summary: Kevin Gordon, head of macro research and strategy at the Schwab Center for Financial Research, explains how high-performing stocks aren't always the ones making headlines. He speaks at the Bloomberg Money subscriber-only event on June 2 in New York.  (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
